$comment: Optional hooks profile for Implement mode in AskCursor. Allows git commit/push while blocking obviously destructive commands. Copy to .cursor/hooks.json in the target repository — not this app repo. Do not use alongside docs/hooks.example.json (read-only profile).

beforeShellExecution.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const payload=JSON.parse(input); const cmd=(payload.command||'').toLowerCase(); const blocked=[/\brm\s+-rf\b/,/\bgit\s+push\s+.*(--force|-f)\b/,/\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b/,/\bgit\s+clean\s+-fd\b/]; if(blocked.some((rule)=>rule.test(cmd))){console.error(JSON.stringify({permission:'deny',user_message:'Destructive shell command blocked.',agent_message:'This command is blocked for safety. Use a safer alternative.'})); process.exit(0);} console.log(JSON.stringify({permission:'allow'}));"
